sentences.target: On mange sur la terrasse extérieure.

translations.fr: On mange sur la terrasse extérieure.
translations.en: We’re eating on the outdoor terrace.
translations.es: Estamos comiendo en la terraza al aire libre.
translations.pt: Estamos comendo no terraço ao ar livre.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang ăn ở sân hiên ngoài trời.
translations.hi: हम बाहरी टैरेस पर खा रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang makan di teras luar.
translations.da: Vi spiser på den udendørs terrasse.
translations.ja: 私たちは屋外のテラスで食事しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject (3rd person singular meaning ‘one/we’).
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with ‘On’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with ‘terrasse’.
Common noun (feminine singular), head of the prepositional complement of ‘sur’.
Adjective, feminine singular, modifying ‘terrasse’ (‘outdoor/exterior’).

sentences.target: Le mur extérieur a besoin de peinture.
sentences.reading: /lə myʁ ɛkstɛʁjœʁ a bəzwɛ̃ də pɛ̃tyʁ/

translations.fr: Le mur extérieur a besoin de peinture.
translations.ipa: /lə myʁ ɛkstɛʁjœʁ a bəzwɛ̃ də pɛ̃tyʁ/
translations.it: Il muro esterno ha bisogno di una mano di vernice.
translations.pt: A parede externa precisa de pintura.
translations.vi: Bức tường bên ngoài cần sơn.
translations.nl: De buitenmuur heeft een verfbeurt nodig.
translations.hu: A külső falnak festésre van szüksége.
translations.hi: बाहरी दीवार को पेंट की ज़रूरत है.
translations.da: Den udvendige mur trænger til maling.
translations.ja: 外壁は塗装が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determining ‘mur’.
Common noun (masculine singular), subject of the clause.
Adjective, masculine singular, modifying ‘mur’ (‘outer/exterior’).
Verb ‘avoir’ in present (3rd person singular); part of the light-verb construction ‘avoir besoin de’ = ‘to need’.
Common noun in the expression ‘avoir besoin de’ (‘to have need of’).
Preposition introducing the complement of ‘besoin’.
Common noun (feminine singular), complement of ‘besoin de’.

sentences.target: J'aime les activités extérieures au printemps.

translations.fr: J'aime les activités extérieures au printemps.
translations.en: I like outdoor activities in spring.
translations.es: Me gustan las actividades al aire libre en primavera.
translations.de: Ich mag Aktivitäten im Freien im Frühling.
translations.it: Mi piacciono le attività all'aperto in primavera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢春天的户外活动。
translations.yue: 我鍾意春天嘅戶外活動。
translations.ru: Мне нравятся занятия на свежем воздухе весной.
translations.pt: Eu gosto de atividades ao ar livre na primavera.
translations.vi: Tôi thích các hoạt động ngoài trời vào mùa xuân.
translations.nl: Ik houd van buitenactiviteiten in de lente.
translations.uk: Мені подобаються заняття на свіжому повітрі навесні.
translations.hi: मुझे वसंत में बाहरी गतिविधियाँ पसंद हैं.
translations.pl: Lubię aktywności na świeżym powietrzu wiosną.
translations.el: Μου αρέσουν οι υπαίθριες δραστηριότητες την άνοιξη.
translations.id: Saya suka aktivitas luar ruangan saat musim semi.
translations.sv: Jag tycker om utomhusaktiviteter på våren.
translations.ro: Îmi plac activitățile în aer liber primăvara.
translations.cs: Mám rád venkovní aktivity na jaře.
translations.da: Jeg kan lide udendørs aktiviteter om foråret.
translations.ja: 春は屋外の活動が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic pronoun ‘je’ elided before vowel + verb ‘aimer’; 1st person singular present (‘I like/love’).
Definite article, plural, determining ‘activités’.
Common noun (feminine plural), direct object of ‘J'aime’.
Adjective, feminine plural, agreeing with ‘activités’ (‘outdoor/outside’).
Contraction of ‘à’ + ‘le’; preposition introducing a temporal complement (‘in the spring’).
Common noun (masculine singular), object of the preposition ‘au’.

sentences.target: Son escalier extérieur est un peu dangereux.
sentences.reading: /sɔ̃ nɛskalje ɛkstɛʁjœʁ ɛt œ̃ pø dɑ̃ʒʁø/

translations.fr: Son escalier extérieur est un peu dangereux.
translations.ipa: /sɔ̃ nɛskalje ɛkstɛʁjœʁ ɛt œ̃ pø dɑ̃ʒʁø/
translations.en: His outside staircase is a bit dangerous.
translations.es: Su escalera exterior es un poco peligrosa.
translations.de: Seine Außentreppe ist ein bisschen gefährlich.
translations.it: La sua scala esterna è un po' pericolosa.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的室外楼梯有点危险。
translations.yue: 佢嘅室外樓梯有啲危險。
translations.pt: A escada externa dele é um pouco perigosa.
translations.vi: Cầu thang ngoài trời của anh ấy hơi nguy hiểm.
translations.nl: Zijn buitentrap is een beetje gevaarlijk.
translations.hi: उसकी बाहरी सीढ़ियाँ थोड़ी खतरनाक हैं.
translations.pl: Jego zewnętrzne schody są trochę niebezpieczne.
translations.el: Η εξωτερική του σκάλα είναι λίγο επικίνδυνη.
translations.nb: Den utvendige trappen hans er litt farlig.
translations.ro: Scara lui exterioară este puțin periculoasă.
translations.cs: Jeho venkovní schodiště je trochę nebezpečné.
translations.da: Hans udendørs trappe er lidt farlig.
translations.ja: 彼の屋外の階段は少し危険です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person), masculine singular, agreeing with ‘escalier’.
Common noun (masculine singular), subject of the clause.
Adjective, masculine singular, modifying ‘escalier’.
Copular form of ‘être’ (3rd person singular) linking subject to predicate.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determining ‘peu’.
Noun meaning ‘a little, a small amount’ in the fixed expression ‘un peu’, functioning adverbially as a degree modifier.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular, complement of the copula ‘est’.
